titles.romaji: Alice Gear Aegis: Doki! Actress Darake no Mermaid Grand Prix ♥
titles.english: alice gear aegis Expansion: Heart Pounding! Actress Packed Mermaid Grand Prix!
titles.native: アリス・ギア・アイギス ～ドキッ！アクトレスだらけのマーメイドグランプリ♥～
titles.tmdb_title: Alice Gear Aegis Expansion: Heart Pounding! Actress Packed Mermaid Grand Prix!

description:
Anime adaptation of the 3D smartphone shooting game "Alice Gear Aegis" by the developer COLOPL.

The M-1 Tag Team Grand Prix finally kicks off! The race will determine the top mermaid and winner of 10 million yen! Too bad there’s a big frog and a cyclone in the way.

(Source: HIDIVE)

Note: The anime's other episodes are only viewable by scanning a QR code contained within 3 different figures. Depending on the figure that the QR code is taken from, the ending will be different.
